ip_outcome_note: Card name, Gargoyle type-line in oracle text, and Ravensburger official Gargoyles franchise classification all confirm this is canonically Goliath from Disney's Gargoyles (1994). Blue-purple coloring and castle rooftop setting match the character's iconic appearance.

trivia_bullets.text: Whispers in the Well (set 10, November 14 2025) marks the Gargoyles franchise's first appearance in Disney Lorcana. The set introduces 12 Gargoyles characters alongside Darkwing Duck as the set's headline franchises.

The shared STONE BY DAY drawback (characters can't ready with 3 or more cards in hand) directly translates the show's core premise into mechanics. GamesRadar noted it 'turns a foundational piece of lore from the animated series into tangible mechanics that are more than just fluff.'

Cost 4, Strength 5, Willpower 5, Ruby, 1 lore. BE CAREFUL ALL OF YOU triggers 1 lore whenever any Gargoyle character challenges, making this the lore-engine centerpiece in Ruby-Steel Gargoyles builds. Pair with Tinker Bell: Insistent Fairy as early-game enabler.
sources: gamingtrend.com Ruby Steel Gargoyles deckbuilding guide

trivia_bullets.text: In source canon, Goliath was named by Castle Wyvern's humans (biblical giant reference) due to his 6 ft. 10 in., 400 lb. stature — gargoyles did not have a naming tradition. He led the Wyvern Clan in 994 Scotland before being frozen for 1,000 years.
